title: Adult education and skills funding: allocations guidance
body: "We publish information on this page that helps you understand your funding allocations for adult skills funding, advanced learner loans and bursaries and apprenticeships (carry-in and non-levy).  Update on adult education and skills funding allocations for 2025 to 2026 This is the latest information on funding allocations including how we are changing our funding methodology for academic year 2025 to 2026.  Adult education and skills funding allocation guidance These allocation guides explain how we have calculated your funding allocation for the relevant academic year.  We will update our academic year 2025 to 2026 guidance as we progress with issuing allocations.  Business case form and guidance Use this information to submit a business case after you have received your funding allocation statement for academic year 2025 to 2026. "
